title: Creator Minecraft Java
description: Allows you to make models like Blockbench but allows a simplistic approach to it
body:
![Creator Minecraft Java Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JbsEtvYf/images/f0786bebca5c672e541d8ec8de951977d0e6a93e.png)

## Update (2024/7/27)
This is still being worked on. I plan on releasing The Big Update in August.

# About
Creator Minecraft Java allows you to make models like 3D Software but allows a simplistic approach to it.

Currently, it has few features and no saving feature as of right now however it will improve over time. pre-alpha version 1.0.0 is a very early demonstration of what this mod is. 

No Lag Performace!

### Model Edit
This feature is the main feature for model creation. It has Model Part Editing Dragging, Add modelpart Button and can delete a modelpart. Also has a visual modelpart list.  

### Requirements
[Fabric only] Fabric API is REQUIRED.  
[Quilt only] Quilted Fabric API is REQUIRED.   
[Forge only] Architectury is REQUIRED.   

# Progress Preview

### The Big Update - 1.1.0 

* Minecraft Transit Railway Resource Pack Creator 3.2.2 & 4.0.0 Support
* Addon Creator Feature
* Creator Keyboard Shortcuts Screen 
* Minecraft World Model Editing
* Save and Load File Feature 
* Folder Group Feature
* Better Model Control
* Home Page + Beginner Guide
  
This includes most features from my Experimental Project:
[I Coded 3D Model Creator In Minecraft - Youtube Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cnV9IBeM1UI&t=206s&ab_channel=ExtremeMakerX)
Also many more features 
# Keyboard Shortcuts
Editing Model on Model Edit - TAB  
Delete Model - DELETE
